info.title: Admission Application API
info.description: REST API for the Secondary School Admission Registration System. Manages applicant biodata, next-of-kin information, and health records.

post.description: Authenticates an applicant using their application number and password. Returns a Bearer token for use on all protected applicant endpoints.
Revokes the current applicant Bearer token.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not belong to an applicant

get.description: Returns basic profile information for the currently authenticated applicant.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not belong to an applicant

get.summary: List applicants with optional filtering and pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, phone or application number

post.description: Creates an applicant record together with next-of-kin and health record in one request. An application number is auto-generated. Send as `multipart/form-data` when including a passport photo.

get.summary: Look up an application by application number (public)
Get print-ready data for an application form
get.description: Returns a structured payload with all information needed to render and print the admission application form.

passport_data_uri.description: Base64 data URI of the passport photo. Use this for printing/PDF so the image is never blocked by CORS.

get.summary: Get the authenticated applicant's full application
get.description: Returns the complete application record — biodata, next-of-kin, health record and current admission status — for the logged-in applicant.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not belong to an applicant

get.description: Returns only the application number and current admission status. Useful for a lightweight status-check call.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not belong to an applicant

post.description: Uploads a passport photo for the authenticated applicant. Send as `multipart/form-data`. Replaces any previously uploaded photo.

passport.description: Image file (jpg, jpeg, png). Max 2 MB.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not belong to an applicant

422.description: Validation error (invalid file type or size)

get.summary: Get print-ready data for the authenticated applicant's form
get.description: Returns a structured payload with all information needed to render and print the admission application form for the logged-in applicant.

passport_data_uri.description: Base64 data URI of the passport photo. Use this for printing/PDF so the image is never blocked by CORS.

403.description: Forbidden — token does not belong to an applicant

get.summary: Admission statistics for the admin dashboard

passport.description: Optional passport photo (jpg/jpeg/png, max 2 MB). Send as multipart/form-data when included.

sanctum.description: Enter the token returned by POST /api/v1/auth/login
